title: Warm up
content: Images depicting three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, highlighting their unique characteristics through visuals inside a car.
key_claims: Chongqing: Combination of tradition and modernity.
Hangzhou: Technological advancement in driving experiences.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide presents a collage of taxis and various iconic locations across China, introducing the theme 'A Ride Through China'.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session encourages investigating local features, development strategies, and their outcomes for cities. It suggests a structured approach for analysis.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Pairs each city with its respective development strategy, emphasizing Beijing's technology integration, Chongqing's urban development, and Hangzhou's economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide showcases perspectives on urban development strategies from taxi drivers, linking city strategies to local features. Emphasizes adaptation based on local conditions.
